Mobile phone upgrades will be discounted with the _______ of a one-year service plan.
Meeting coordinators are _______ to make sure the projection equipment is turned off after each use.
For questions _______ to the use of personal time off, please contact Ms. Matz in the human resources department.
Ammeto software _______ team members to view project-related schedules, resources, and costs.
Customer service representatives are _______ to answer your inquiries 24 hours a day.
The audience laughed so _______ during the play that some of the actors' lines were drowned out.
Customers may request parking validation _______ before or after they dine with us.
Prestige Apartment Homes offers _______ apartments for an additional cost.
Mr. Park must wait for _______ from human resources before posting the job announcement.
Please direct inquiries to the appropriate person listed in our _______ staff directory.

Wheller's software tools make market research quick and easy _______ any entrepreneur.

_______ construction, more than 400 meters of public water pipes will be replaced.
The electrical work in the lobby today is not expected to interfere with normal business _______.
Because the accounting team worked so _______, the report was completed ahead of schedule.
The proposal submitted by Ferrisa Associates did not _______ an itemized budget.
The employee handbook _______ states that uniforms must be worn by all customer service providers.
Andara Ebele taught _______ to paint by copying the styles of famous portrait and landscape artists.
Mr. Zasio will need to reschedule his appointment today as his train was unexpectedly _______.
The bottling machine should be turned off _______ it is being cleaned.
Ms. Ogawa is adamantly _______ to the redevelopment project in its current form.
_______ the statistical report is drafted, Ms. Arista will edit it.
Having strong partnerships throughout Southeast Asia has been _______ to Srisati Company's success.
Sarah Davidson _______ Chikara Architects' creative vision more enthusiastically than any other associate did.
_______ with more than a year of employment can apply for tuition assistance if they wish to pursue an academic degree.
Factilis Capital is mainly concerned about the enormous _______ of the Ito Wind Farm project.
All Loreen wristwatches come with _______ black, white, and blue bands.
